title: Mapania macrophylla
taxonomy: Mapania macrophylla is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Cyperaceae. This family is commonly known as the sedge family. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may contribute to the management of various health conditions such as diabetes and cardiovascular disease.
